title: fix(openai): add test for CSV and accommodate breaking changes in file url inputs
body_text:
Adds a test for CSV inputs.

Also updates test for (PDF) file inputs specified via URL. This test was previously passing. The PDF is valid according to Claude. Choose a different PDF that is featured in the OpenAI docs.

extracted_data.summary: This issue adds a test for CSV inputs and updates a test for PDF file inputs specified via URL to accommodate breaking changes in OpenAI's file URL inputs, noting a PDF's validity according to Claude and suggesting a different PDF from OpenAI documentation.
